_note: Canonical versioned failure taxonomy shared by human annotation, model judges, and deterministic checks. The workflows sections are judgment failure modes seeded from the taxonomy previously embedded in docs/self-improvement.md; the structural section mirrors the deterministic CODE evaluators. Expand only when real traces reveal recurring gaps; expansion is a process change and bumps failure_taxonomy_version. Annotations record the failure_taxonomy_version they were judged against so cross-version comparisons can be gated.

structural._note: Structural failure modes emitted by the deterministic CODE evaluators in execution/integrations/linear/src/quality.mjs. This list must contain exactly the ids in the STRUCTURAL_FAILURE_MODES export from that module (existing code reality, not invention); eval-contracts.test.mjs fails when either side drifts. Parameterized emissions (for example missing_context_digest:<phase>) store only the BASE id here; the parameter detail (the phase) goes in annotation metadata as failure_mode_details, and normalizeFailureMode() in quality.mjs strips the :<param> suffix so CODE emissions always normalize to these ids.
